question.label: Decision feedback
question.name: On key decisions, what feedback are you not getting that you need?
question.description: Drills into the missing feedback so the manager can see whether the gap is quality, speed, or alignment.

answer: I want clearer ownership boundaries so I am not default escalation.

assessment.note: Names a specific missing condition — clear ownership boundaries — so this is a deficiency-as-request and a strong clarity/growth gap; growth was previously untouched and is now surfaced.

new_queue.label: Ownership boundaries
new_queue.name: Where are the ownership boundaries most blurred right now?

new_queue.label: Load relief
new_queue.name: What would make the next two weeks lighter for you?

issues: coverage: injected growth into next question (0 touches after turn 6)

history.answer_excerpt: I am proud of the outcomes, but the pace should not be normal.
I still do not get enough substantive feedback on key decisions.
The last stretch shipped, but it was heavier than I made it sound.
Late nights came from carrying decision bottlenecks and final reviews.
Some of that work could have moved to the team sooner.
